title: The Role of Inductive Bias in Machine Learning
description: A visual explanation of how inductive bias acts as a set of assumptions or constraints that guide a learning algorithm's generalization from training data to unseen data.
relationships: Inductive Bias restricts the Hypothesis Space the algorithm searches through
The Learning Algorithm uses the Training Data and is guided by the Inductive Bias to select a Final Model
The Final Model is then applied to make predictions on Unseen Data
